_meta.description: Confirmed cross-system edges (Layer 2b, COMPOSITION_SPEC.md §6). Promoted from cross_source/candidates.json after review. Each edge references entities by URN across DIFFERENT pipelines. The ecosystem projection consumes only confirmed edges here — never candidates.

cross_edges.mechanism: Credit-card spend flow (payments) leads credit-card outstanding stock (SIBC): sustained spending growth precedes balance build-up. Confirmed cross-system instance of the flow→stock law.
Credit-card count (payments, # cards) and credit-card outstanding (SIBC, ₹ balance) are two measures of the same product; together they yield average balance per card.
